skills.name: prepare-nz-study-departure
skills.description: Build and tailor a pre-departure checklist for Chinese students heading to New Zealand, covering documents, payment, phone setup, electronics, adapters, and packing decisions.
skills.description_zh: 为赴新西兰的中国留学生整理出发前清单，覆盖证件、支付、电子设备、插头和打包取舍。

skills.name: kiwi-access-card
skills.description: Answer questions about New Zealand Kiwi Access Card eligibility, online versus in-person application, required documents, fees, processing times, and form interpretation.
skills.description_zh: 解释 Kiwi Access Card 的资格、线上和线下申请、所需材料、费用和表格问题。

skills.name: nz-ird-number
skills.description: Explain how to apply for and use a New Zealand IRD number, including eligibility, required identity documents, tax setup, and common first-arrival questions.
skills.description_zh: 解释 IRD number 的申请、用途、常见材料和到达新西兰后的税务初始化问题。

skills.name: nz-bank-account
skills.description: Explain how international students and new arrivals can open and use a New Zealand bank account, including common document requirements and setup tasks.
skills.description_zh: 解释新西兰银行开户、常见材料、地址证明和日常使用设置。

skills.name: nz-mobile-connectivity
skills.description: Explain how new arrivals in New Zealand can choose and activate mobile service, including prepaid versus plan, SIM versus eSIM, and airport setup.
skills.description_zh: 解释 SIM、eSIM、预付费、套餐选择和落地即用的通信方案。

skills.name: nz-public-transport
skills.description: Explain how to start using public transport in New Zealand cities, including transport cards, local transit apps, airport-to-city setup, and concessions.
skills.description_zh: 解释不同城市的交通卡、官方 app、机场到住处和学生优惠。

skills.name: nz-renting-basics
skills.description: Explain the basics of renting in New Zealand for international students, including application documents, bond, tenancy setup, and first-week housing questions.
skills.description_zh: 解释租房、flatting、bond、入住检查和租房常见文档。

skills.name: nz-healthcare-access
skills.description: Explain how international students and new arrivals can access healthcare in New Zealand, including GPs, urgent care, pharmacies, and student health services.
skills.description_zh: 解释 GP、urgent care、pharmacy、student health 等医疗入口。

skills.name: repo-discoverability
skills.description: Improve the discoverability of a GitHub repository for search engines, GitHub users, and AI agents.
skills.description_zh: 帮助改造 GitHub 仓库，让搜索引擎、GitHub 用户和 AI agents 更容易发现它。

skills.name: nz-travel-planner
skills.description: New Zealand travel planning skill for road trips and multi-day travel, especially in the Auckland Northland and Bay of Islands region.
skills.description_zh: 为新西兰多日行程与自驾路线提供旅行规划能力。

skills.name: travel-planner
skills.description: Universal travel planning skill for multi-day road trips and city-hopping itineraries anywhere in the world.
skills.description_zh: 为不同国家和地区的多日旅行路线提供通用规划能力。

skills.name: nz-skill-creator
skills.description: Create or update repository-native skills in NZ Life Skills and keep package docs, manifests, and bundle-level agent indexes in sync.
skills.description_zh: 在这个仓库里创建或更新 skill，并同步维护 docs、manifests 和 bundle 级 agent 索引。
